title: Foxiest
body:
## Foxy

Ever wanted a animated sleepy fox in your inventory or on your head? Well the day has finally come!  
Get a _fox_spawn_egg_ and you can have a cute little foxy in your Inventory!

![item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32c7c0199efda6aec2adba491f31c163df390ff3.png)
